# contentful_taxonomy_concept (Resource)

Manages a Contentful taxonomy concept.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "contentful_taxonomy_concept" "furniture" {
  organization_id = var.contentful_organization_id
  concept_id      = "furniture"

  pref_label = {
    "en-US" = "Furniture"
  }

  alt_labels = {
    "en-US" = ["Furnishings"]
  }

  notations = ["FURNITURE"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `concept_id` (String) Caller-defined ID of the taxonomy concept.
- `organization_id` (String) ID of the organization that owns the taxonomy concept.
- `pref_label` (Map of String) Localized preferred labels.

### Optional

- `alt_labels` (Map of List of String) Localized alternative labels.
- `broader_concept_ids` (List of String) Ordered IDs of broader concepts.
- `change_note` (Map of String) Localized change notes.
- `definition` (Map of String) Localized definitions.
- `editorial_note` (Map of String) Localized editorial notes.
- `example` (Map of String) Localized examples.
- `hidden_labels` (Map of List of String) Localized hidden labels.
- `history_note` (Map of String) Localized history notes.
- `notations` (List of String) Ordered notation values.
- `note` (Map of String) Localized notes.
- `related_concept_ids` (List of String) Ordered IDs of related concepts.
- `scope_note` (Map of String) Localized scope notes.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))
- `uri` (String) Optional URI identifying the concept. Empty strings are rejected by Contentful.

### Read-Only

- `concept_scheme_ids` (Set of String) IDs of schemes containing the concept.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.
- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Read operations occur during any refresh or planning operation when refresh is enabled.
- `update` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  identity = {
    organization_id = var.contentful_organization_id
    concept_id      = var.concept_id
  }
  to = contentful_taxonomy_concept.furniture
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `concept_id` (String)
- `organization_id` (String)

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  id = "${var.contentful_organization_id}/${var.concept_id}"
  to = contentful_taxonomy_concept.furniture
}
```
